title: athyrium yokoscense var. fauriei
intro: Athyrium yokoscense var. fauriei, also known as Faurie's lady fern, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Athyrium genus, which is a group of ferns native to East Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Korea and China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Athyrium yokoscense var. fauriei include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and possessing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
